calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Apr-14-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Mark Shustoff for and with Co-Executors Myron Lambert and Elena Toulios (Representative of Wells Fargo Bank).

Mr. Shustoff stated that the amendment to the amended petition was sent to the Beneficiaries in a timely manner and that a proof of service was attached to the amendment. The accounting petition was taken under submission.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Allen. (Not Reported)

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION

Off Calendar Jan-27-2014 Continued To Feb-18-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (262 28th Avenue, San Francisco, Ca)
Off Calendar Feb-28-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Mark Shustoff for and with Myron Lambert and for Wells Fargo Bank (Co-Trustees).

The sale was confirmed at $1,593,000.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to receipt and review of the order). Bond is waived.

Judge: John Dearman. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/ Nancy Bautista. Bailiff: Deputy McConico.
